summary: Tested Survey Questions feature for Add Activity form. All 9 survey questions are correctly implemented with radio buttons, validation, and data persistence. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 feature points verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Survey implementation is clean and follows best practices
SURVEY_QUESTIONS const is well-structured with id, label, options, and optional description
Q9 correctly includes description text for program participation agreement
Form validation properly checks all 9 questions before submission
Survey section auto-expands when validation fails - good UX
Backend ActivityCreate and ActivityOut models correctly include survey_responses: Optional[dict]
Survey responses are persisted to MongoDB and returned in GET /api/activities
seed_data_creation: Created test activities with survey responses during testing: TEST_survey_activity, TEST_survey_get_activity, TEST_no_survey_activity, TEST_empty_survey_activity, TEST_partial_survey_activity, TEST_persistence_survey_activity, TEST_custom_survey_values. Also created 1 activity via UI (chirag, 25 Neem trees) with full survey responses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Survey Questions feature is COMPLETE and working. All 9 questions (Q1-Q9) are implemented with correct radio button options. Q9 has description text for program participation agreement. Form validation requires all 9 answers before submission. Survey section has collapsible toggle showing X/9 answered count. Survey responses are stored in backend and displayed in Review dialog. Backend tests verify POST and GET endpoints correctly handle survey_responses field.

features_tested.1_add_activity_dialog_survey_section: PASS - Farmer Survey collapsible section visible with (0/9 answered) indicator
features_tested.2_all_9_questions_present: PASS - Q1 main_crop, Q2 crops_per_year, Q3 crop_residue, Q4 land_preparation, Q5 fertilizer_level, Q6 irrigation_type, Q7 compost_usage, Q8 water_management, Q9 participation_agreement
features_tested.3_radio_button_options: PASS - Each question has correct single-select radio button options
features_tested.4_q9_description_text: PASS - Q9 shows program participation agreement description with bullet points
features_tested.5_validation_requires_all_9: PASS - Toast error 'Please answer all survey questions (9 remaining)' shown when submitting without answers
features_tested.6_survey_auto_expands_on_validation: PASS - Survey section auto-expands when validation fails
features_tested.7_answered_count_indicator: PASS - Toggle shows (X/9 answered) count that updates as questions are answered
features_tested.8_submit_with_all_answers: PASS - Activity submitted successfully with all 9 survey responses
features_tested.9_review_dialog_shows_survey: PASS - Review Activity dialog shows SURVEY RESPONSES section with all 9 answers (Q1-Q9)
features_tested.10_backend_post_survey_responses: PASS - POST /api/activities correctly stores survey_responses field
features_tested.12_backward_compatibility: PASS - Activities can be created without survey_responses (optional field)
